texto: Know that when I kiss your foreheadand not your lips it is to let you knowthat I kiss your dreams, your imagination and your intellect.When I kiss your lips you will know that I will be appealing to your body,asking to consummate desire and passion that overwhelms us leaving our souls breathless.
explicacao: Citação de William Osorio Nicolas sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Know that when I kiss your foreheadand not your lips it is to let you knowthat I kiss your dreams…” articula reflexao, love-quote, foreheadand em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: Know that when I kiss your foreheadand not your lips it is to let you knowthat I kiss your dreams, your imagination and your intellect.When I kiss your lips you will know that I will be appealing to your body,asking to consummate desire and passion that overwhelms us leaving our souls breathless.
